personal.name: Firmansyah Davin Falahtama
personal.title: AI & Cloud Engineer
aboutParagraphs: AI and Cloud Engineer with experience building Generative AI, NLP, and LLM-based systems as well as managing cloud infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (Terraform) on AWS.
Experienced in developing AI-powered chatbots, implementing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, and deploying applications using FastAPI, Docker, and cloud platforms.

Currently working in the Cloud Center of Excellence (CCOE) at CIMB Niaga, focusing on cloud infrastructure provisioning, automation, and internal cloud platform services. Passionate about combining AI, cloud, and automation to build scalable and impactful technology solutions.

experience.description: Provision and manage cloud infrastructure on AWS using Terraform (IaC). Manage Cloud Service Catalog via Ivanti, design workflows for instance resizing, resource provisioning, IAM permissions, and decommissioning. Collaborate with engineering teams to standardize cloud operations.

Developed AI-driven solutions for consulting clients. Built Data Analyst Chatbot using GPT-4o-mini, OpenAI Assistant API, and Code Interpreter. Designed custom RAG chatbot with Pinecone vector search, deployed via FastAPI and Docker on GCP. Created corporate training syllabus on NLP and Generative AI.

experience.company: Sekretariat Ditjen Dikti Ristek — Kampus Merdeka
experience.description: Developed Borobudur AI Chatbot powered by LLMs for students. Implemented RAG using LangChain, built prototype with Gradio, and evaluated models using BLEU, ROUGE, and BERT metrics. Integrated sentiment analysis using IndoBERT for input filtering.

Customer Profiling for PLN using Python. Performed Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) and Clustering to uncover meaningful customer relationships. Conducted customer segmentation to provide valuable insights into the diverse customer base.

education.description: by Google, GoTo, and Traveloka — Kampus Merdeka. Capstone: Built GiziWise — an app that analyzes nutritional content of food from images.

projects.title: PMB Chatbot ITPLN
projects.description: Developed a Chatbot using LLM for New Student Admissions (PMB) at ITPLN. Used Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with Google Gemini model and PDF text extraction for contextual responses. Evaluated using ROUGE metric and human evaluation.

projects.title: Data Analyst Chatbot
projects.description: Built a data analyst chatbot using GPT-4o-mini, OpenAI Assistant API, and Code Interpreter. Deployed on Streamlit — users can upload CSV data, ask questions, generate plots/charts, and create code snippets for analysis.

projects.title: GiziWise App
projects.description: Bangkit Academy capstone project. An app that analyzes nutritional content of food and beverages by capturing images. Uses TensorFlow Object Detection and provides detailed nutritional information, articles, and healthy recipes.

projects.title: Food Object Detection
projects.description: Built a machine learning algorithm to detect food objects using TensorFlow Object Detection API. Supports GiziWise app backend for image analysis and food recognition.

projects.title: Borobudur AI Chatbot
projects.description: Interactive chatbot for students powered by LLMs. Implemented RAG using LangChain, evaluated multiple LLMs, integrated sentiment analysis with IndoBERT, and built prototype interface using Gradio.

projects.title: PLN Customer Profiling
projects.description: Comprehensive customer profiling for PLN using Python. Performed EDA and clustering to uncover meaningful relationships within the dataset. Conducted customer segmentation for business insights.
